secureBanner: Secure Digital Consent Portal · Agentix HIMS

error.expiredBody: This consent link has expired. Please ask the doctor to send a new link.
error.invalidBody: This consent link is invalid or has already been used. Please contact the hospital.
error.alreadySignedBody: Consent has already been submitted for this procedure. No further action is needed.
error.missingBody: This consent link could not be found. Please ask the doctor to resend it.

notify.title: Consent received · {patient}
notify.body: {name} ({relationship}) has signed consent for {procedure}. Procedure may now proceed.

info.title: Consent Required
info.subtitle: Your signature is needed to proceed
info.guardianNote: You are being asked to provide consent as the next-of-kin / legal guardian of the above patient. Please read the consent form carefully before signing.

otp.title: Verify Identity
otp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code provided by the treating doctor
otp.error: Incorrect code. Please check with the doctor and try again.
otp.hint: This code was shared with your doctor when they sent the consent link.

form.heading: Consent for {procedure}
form.readAll: Please read all sections before signing
form.declarationCheckbox: I have read and understood the consent form above, and I give my informed consent for this procedure.
form.checkToEnable: Check the declaration above to enable signing

done.title: Consent Submitted
done.thankYou: Thank you, {name}. Your consent for {procedure} has been received and the medical team has been notified.
done.closeWindow: You may safely close this window.
